description: Style Noteadrika captures the mood of the moment with this statement piece designed to snazz up any outfit. Keep the rest of your accessories minimal for maximum impact and style this with a monochrome top. Product DetailsBrown oval and spherical beads that connect to a metal link chainHas a lobster claspMaterial and CareWooden and glass beads with brass fittingsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength: 60 cm
